StructurePhase.Reference: Mishima Y., Ochiai S., Suzuki T., Acta Metall., v33 p1161-1169 (1985)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO3. LPF Collection Code: 1815406. Sample Preparation: STARTINGMATERIALS: Ni (metal), Ga (metal), Si (metal). COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted, heated at 1273 K for 5 d in sealed evacuated silica tube, furnace-cooled. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Article Title: LATTICE PARAMETERS OF Ni(γ), Ni3Al(γ`) AND Ni3Ga(γ`) SOLID SOLUTIONS WITH ADDITIONS OF TRANSITION AND B-SUBGROUP ELEMENTS. Minor Warning: No R factors reported/abstracted. Minor warning from the LPF Editor exist. No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. Wyckoff Sequence: c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Pfisterer H., Schubert K., Z. Metallkd., v41 p358 (1950)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: AX. LPF Collection Code: 261219. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: melted. CRUCIBLE: sealed quartz tube. ATMOSPHERE: nitrogen. Article Title: Neue Phasen vom MnP(B31)-Typ. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: c2. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
